query: Apple fiscal year 2024 total annual revenue official
answer: Apple's total annual revenue for fiscal year 2024 was $391.035 billion, a 2.02% increase from 2023. This figure reflects the company's performance over the entire fiscal year.

results.title: Apple 10-K FY2024 Annual Report Guide - Libertify.com
results.snippet: This comprehensive guide breaks down every critical component of Apple’s FY2024 annual report — from revenue segmentation and geographic performance to risk factors and capital allocation — providing investors, analysts, and business strategists with actionable insights directly from the source filing. Despite representing over half of Apple’s revenue, the iPhone segment delivered essentially flat growth in FY2024 — rising just 0.3% from $200.6 billion to $201.2 billion. Reaching **$96.2 billion** in annual revenue — up 13% year-over-year — Services now generates nearly one-quarter of Apple’s total sales. Apple’s **research and development expenditure** reached approximately **$31.4 billion** in FY2024, up from $29.9 billion in FY2023 — representing roughly 8% of total revenue. Apple’s Services revenue reached $96.2 billion in FY2024, growing 13% year-over-year from $85.2 billion in FY2023. Apple’s 10-K discloses several key risks including: heavy dependence on iPhone sales (51% of revenue), manufacturing concentration in Asia (particularly China, Taiwan, and Vietnam), declining revenue in Greater China (-8% YoY), increasing regulatory scrutiny globally (EU Digital Markets Act, antitrust actions), and intense competition across all product categories.

results.title: Apple reports fourth quarter results

results.title: Apple Revenue 2016-2025 - Bullfincher
results.snippet: Apple's quarterly revenue was **$124.30 B**(Q1: Dec 2024), **$95.36 B**(Q2: Mar 2025), **$94.04 B**(Q3: Jun 2025), **$102.47 B**(Q4: Sep 2025) in fiscal year 2025. Apple's quarterly revenue was **$119.58 B**(Q1: Dec 2023), **$90.75 B**(Q2: Mar 2024), **$85.78 B**(Q3: Jun 2024), **$94.93 B**(Q4: Sep 2024) in fiscal year 2024. Apple's quarterly revenue was **$117.15 B**(Q1: Dec 2022), **$94.84 B**(Q2: Apr 2023), **$81.80 B**(Q3: Jul 2023), **$89.50 B**(Q4: Sep 2023) in fiscal year 2023. Apple's quarterly revenue was **$123.95 B**(Q1: Dec 2021), **$97.28 B**(Q2: Mar 2022), **$82.96 B**(Q3: Jun 2022), **$90.15 B**(Q4: Sep 2022) in fiscal year 2022. Apple's quarterly revenue was **$111.44 B**(Q1: Dec 2020), **$89.58 B**(Q2: Mar 2021), **$81.43 B**(Q3: Jun 2021), **$83.36 B**(Q4: Sep 2021) in fiscal year 2021. Apple's quarterly revenue was **$91.82 B**(Q1: Dec 2019), **$58.31 B**(Q2: Mar 2020), **$59.69 B**(Q3: Jun 2020), **$64.70 B**(Q4: Sep 2020) in fiscal year 2020. Apple's quarterly revenue was **$78.35 B**(Q1: Dec 2016), **$52.90 B**(Q2: Apr 2017), **$45.41 B**(Q3: Jul 2017), **$52.58 B**(Q4: Sep 2017) in fiscal year 2017.

results.title: Press release issued by Apple Inc. on October 31, 2024.
results.snippet: “Our record business performance during the September quarter drove nearly $27 billion in operating cash flow, allowing us to return over $29 billion to our shareholders,” said Luca Maestri, Apple’s CFO. Adjustments to reconcile net income to cash generated by operating activities:. (b)Non-GAAP adjustments to provision for income taxes and net income to reflect the impact of the reversal of the European General Court’s State Aid decision recognized during the fourth quarter of 2024. As a result, during the fourth quarter of 2024 the Company recorded a one-time income tax charge of $10.2 billion, net, which represents $15.8 billion payable to Ireland via release of restricted funds held in escrow, partially offset by a U.S. foreign tax credit of $4.8 billion and a decrease in unrecognized tax benefits of $823 million. (c)Represents the per-share impact of the non-GAAP adjustments to net income.
